'''Betshish''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] along the [[Pinooran Spur/Legends|Pinooran Spur]] between [[Mogoshyn]] and [[Kli'aar]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of a [[Unidentified Betshish species|sentient species]]. Betshish was discovered by a scout, [[Lile Gorsek]], but his claim to the world had to be abandoned when the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] was discovered on landing.<ref name="GG2" /> While it was interdicted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world escaped exploitation.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
